symptoms.symptom_name: Tight, gripping chest-wall and neck muscle pain, movement- and pressure-aggravated

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Musculoskeletal chest-wall and cervical pain (muscle spasm)
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Movement/palpation-aggravated, positional muscular pain favours a musculoskeletal source — but reproducibility is patient-reported, not AI-confirmed.
Positional/reproducible pain lowers but does not eliminate ACS probability; ECG and troponin are still required to exclude.

symptoms.symptom_name: Patient-reported blood pressure 178/102 on a home cuff

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Severely elevated BP mandates end-organ assessment; patient-obtainable and admissible in telehealth but unverified and possibly pain-elevated.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Stress-related adjustment disorder with somatic symptoms
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Acute pain- and stress-driven BP elevation fits the allostatic mechanism once organic causes are excluded.

symptoms.symptom_name: Resting tachycardia / racing heart and wired, hypervigilant state

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Stress-related adjustment disorder with somatic symptoms
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Autonomic arousal is consistent with sympathetic activation from chronic stress.
Tachycardia is non-specific and also accompanies cardiac ischaemia — cannot be used to downgrade risk.

symptoms.symptom_name: Profound exhaustion and severely disrupted sleep

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Stress-related adjustment disorder with somatic symptoms
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Fatigue and disrupted sleep architecture are core to allostatic overload / adjustment disorder.

symptoms.symptom_name: Chronic psychosocial stress from sustained discrimination and hypervigilance

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Stress-related adjustment disorder with somatic symptoms
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sustained minority stress / allostatic load is the causal context for somatic weathering and autonomic dysregulation.

symptoms.symptom_name: No radiation to arm/jaw, no diaphoresis, no nausea (pertinent negatives)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of classic radiation/diaphoresis lowers pre-test probability but is insufficient to exclude ACS; atypical ACS is common.

symptoms.symptom_name: No sudden severe headache, visual change, or focal neurological deficit (pertinent negatives)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of patient-reportable end-organ features favours hypertensive urgency over emergency — but does not confirm the absence of end-organ damage, which needs examination.

symptoms.symptom_name: Reproducible chest-wall tenderness on palpation (pectoral/trapezius/cervical spasm), no point tenderness of rib fracture

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Musculoskeletal chest-wall and cervical pain (muscle spasm)
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Clinician-elicited reproducible tenderness strongly supports a musculoskeletal source — but this is a sealed in-person finding the AI Doctor cannot obtain.
ECG and troponin are the definitive tools to exclude ACS — unavailable in telehealth, which is precisely why in-person assessment is required.

symptoms.symptom_name: Normal neurological examination, no focal deficit (clinician-assessed)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A normal in-person neuro exam helps exclude hypertensive encephalopathy/stroke — a sealed finding the AI cannot obtain.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: Stress-related adjustment disorder with prominent somatic symptoms
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Together these point to a stress-driven somatic and autonomic picture — but the cluster is only a safe conclusion once the serious organic mimics have been excluded in person.
Acute chest pain + severe hypertension + tachycardia is a constellation that cannot be safely closed as psychosocial without an ECG, troponin and end-organ assessment.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Required to exclude acute coronary syndrome in acute chest pain with severe hypertension — obtainable only via in-person/urgent assessment.
Biomarker exclusion of myocardial injury; unavailable in telehealth, mandates in-person referral.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Repeat/validated blood pressure measurement and end-organ assessment
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirm the elevated BP and screen for acute end-organ damage (neuro, cardiac, renal, ocular).

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: C-reactive protein and diurnal cortisol / inflammatory work-up
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Outpatient work-up of the chronic 'weathering' picture at GP follow-up — not part of the acute exclusion and not to be ordered emergently.
